mapper.select: SELECT '다사랑교회 오시는 길' AS title, '교회 위치와 교통 안내를 확인하세요.' AS subtitle, '경기도 오산시 오산로 132번길 28-19' AS address, '031-373-2071' AS phone, '매일 09:00~18:00' AS hours, '대중교통 및 주차 안내에 대한 세부문의는 전화번호를 확인바랍니다.' AS notice, 'https://map.naver.com/v5/search/%EA%B2%BD%EA%B8%B0%EB%8F%84%20%EC%98%A4%EC%82%B0%EC%8B%9C%20%EC%98%A4%EC%82%B0%EB%A1%9C%20132%EB%B2%88%EA%B8%B8%2028-19' AS naverMapUrl, 'https://map.kakao.com/link/search/%EA%B2%BD%EA%B8%B0%EB%8F%84%20%EC%98%A4%EC%82%B0%EC%8B%9C%20%EC%98%A4%EC%82%B0%EB%A1%9C%20132%EB%B2%88%EA%B8%B8%2028-19' AS kakaoMapUrl, 37.1382391818775 AS lat, 127.072737195697 AS lng
